'''Aidel Saxan''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]].

==Biography==
Several years after the end of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], she had become the first [[Five World Prime Minister]] of the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]]. She married fellow politician [[Denjax Teppler]], but they divorced amicably some years later. At the start of the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], she was middle aged.

Saxan was assassinated by the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lady]] [[Lumiya]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] during negotiations with [[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]], the victim of a high-powered blaster shot to the chest. [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]], the [[Head of State/Legends|Head of State]] of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], was suspected of involvement, which was proven afterward by Jacen and Lumiya.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1st}}
